lesson: Do not treat this as a generic PowerPoint styling task. The source deck is a recurring stakeholder update format; structure and update rhythm matter before decoration.

Pure blank-slide reconstruction misses PowerPoint master/layout assets. Exact MoH deck reproduction requires preserving template context, then rebuilding editable text and retaining complex table/visual assets when native rebuilding changes rendering.

Visual-difference thresholds alone missed small text objects such as slide section number 03 and the cover date. Future PowerPoint rebuild validation must include text-shape parity checks against the source deck before handover.
